name: Gemma-4-E2B-it
description: A variant of Gemma 4 E2B with up to 32K context length. Supports multi-modality input.

name: Gemma-4-E4B-it
description: A variant of Gemma 4 E4B with up to 32K context length. Supports multi-modality input.

name: Gemma-3n-E2B-it
description: A variant of Gemma 3n E2B. Supports text, vision, and audio input.

name: Gemma3-1B-IT
description: A variant of Gemma-3-1B-IT with 4-bit quantization.

name: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct
description: A variant of Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct ready for deployment on Android.
